title: İstanbul Galata Üniversitesi
content:

News

Our Rector, Prof. Dr. Şeyma Aydınoğlu, attended The Istanbul Education Summit, representing our university

The Istanbul Education Summit, organized by the Turkish Maarif Foundation, took place at the Atatürk Cultural Center.

The summit, themed "Healing the World Through Education," was graced by the attendance of the First Lady of Türkiye, Her Excellency Emine Erdoğan, and the First Lady of Syria, Her Excellency Latifa al-Droubi, as Guests of Honor.

Our Rector, Prof. Dr. Şeyma Aydınoğlu, attended the summit, representing our university.

DİĞER HABERLER

PROSPECTIVE STUDENT

STUDENT
